sentences.text: From your folder to the internet
Your site works in the preview, but it only lives on your computer.
To share it you publish it via a host — a service that stores your files and serves them to visitors at a URL.
For a small site, free hosts like Netlify, Vercel, or GitHub Pages are plenty.
Right now you publish manually: create a free Netlify account, choose "Deploy manually," and drag your project folder into the upload area.
Netlify hands you a live URL that works on any device.
When you change something, drag the folder in again to update.
